rulings.Case Title: JANE HOWELL MD VS. JANET MOHRDICK et al
rulings.Rulings: ON CALENDAR FOR WEDNESDAY, AUGUST 2, 2006. DEFENDANT THRIFTY PAYLESS, INC. DBA RITE AID'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION. SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND SECOND AND THIRD OF CAUSES OF ACTION. IF CAN ALLEGED IN GOOD FAITH 1.)RE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION RITE AID'S ADVANCE KNOWLEDGE OF DOG'S DANGEROUS PROPENSITY TO BITE. 2.) RE THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION EITHER DOG OUT OF CONTROL OR ALLOWING DOGS DENIED EQUAL ACCESS TO DISABLED. =(302/REQ/HE)
